CREATE TABLE Demo.demo.Shippers (ID INT, Name VARCHAR(100));
INSERT INTO Demo.demo.Shippers (ID, Name) VALUES (1, 'Shipper A'), (2, 'Shipper B');
CREATE TABLE Demo.demo.Orders (OrderID INT, ShipperID INT, Product VARCHAR(100));
INSERT INTO Demo.demo.Orders (OrderID, ShipperID, Product) VALUES (1, 1, 'Product X'), (2, 2, 'Product Y');
SELECT * FROM Demo.demo.Orders WHERE ShipperID IN (SELECT ID FROM Demo.demo.Shippers);
CREATE TABLE Demo.demo.Products (ProductID INT, ProductName VARCHAR(100));
INSERT INTO Demo.demo.Products (ProductID, ProductName) VALUES (1, 'Product A'), (2, 'Product B');
SELECT * FROM Demo.demo.Products WHERE ProductID IN (SELECT DISTINCT ShipperID FROM Demo.demo.Orders);
CREATE TABLE Demo.demo.Customers (CustomerID INT, ShipperID INT);
SELECT c.CustomerID, s.Name FROM Demo.demo.Customers c JOIN Demo.demo.Shippers s ON c.ShipperID = s.ID;
